docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRECIADO, ALFRED AS TO DEFENDANT GENOVEA, BERNADETTE CRYSTAL GENOVEA, BETHONY GRACE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-18-2004
